attributes.title: [WebSphere OTel] Resource Pools
attributes.description: Thread pool and connection pool health for WebSphere Application Server. Monitors utilisation, hung threads, waiting threads, faults, and pool sizing.

params.markdown:
## [WebSphere OTel] Resource Pools

Thread pool and connection pool health monitoring:
- WebContainer thread pool utilisation and hung threads
- Connection pool utilisation by data source
- Threads waiting for connections
- Connection timeout faults
- Pool sizing and capacity

query.esql:
TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.pool == "WebContainer"
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads)), pool_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_size))
| EVAL utilization = CASE(pool_size > 0, active / pool_size, 0), min_val = 0, max_val = 1, goal_val = 0.7

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.pool == "WebContainer"
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads)), pool_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_size))
| EVAL utilization = CASE(pool_size > 0, active / pool_size, 0), min_val = 0, max_val = 1, goal_val = 0.7

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization))
| EVAL min_val = 0, max_val = 100, goal_val = 70

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization))
| EVAL min_val = 0, max_val = 100, goal_val = 70

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.pool
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.pool
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS hung = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.pool
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS hung = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.pool
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads)), pool_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_size)), hung = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads)) BY attributes.pool
| EVAL utilization = CASE(pool_size > 0, active / pool_size, 0)
| SORT utilization DESC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads)), pool_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_size)), hung = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads)) BY attributes.pool
| EVAL utilization = CASE(pool_size > 0, active / pool_size, 0)
| SORT utilization DESC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_waiting_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS waiting = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_waiting_threads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_waiting_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS waiting = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_waiting_threads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_fault_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS faults = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_connectionpool_fault_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_fault_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS faults = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_connectionpool_fault_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_jdbcOperations_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS jdbc_ops = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_connectionpool_jdbcOperations_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_jdbcOperations_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS jdbc_ops = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_connectionpool_jdbcOperations_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS pool_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_size)), free = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_free_connections)), managed = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_managed_connections)), utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization)), waiting = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_waiting_threads)) BY attributes.jndiname
| SORT utilization DESC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS pool_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_size)), free = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_free_connections)), managed = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_managed_connections)), utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization)), waiting = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_waiting_threads)) BY attributes.jndiname
| SORT utilization DESC
